name: draft-content
description: Draft blog posts, social media, email newsletters, landing pages, press releases, and case studies with channel-specific formatting and SEO recommendations. Use when writing any marketing content, when you need headline or subject line options, or when adapting a message for a specific platform, audience, and brand voice.

inputs.name: brief
inputs.description: Content type, topic, target audience, 2-4 key messages, tone, and target length

inputs.name: brand-context
inputs.description: Brand voice / style guide (read from the project context.md or pasted); falls back to a neutral professional tone

outputs.name: draft
outputs.description: Channel-specific marketing copy with headline/subject options and SEO notes
